mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_od_aftercare WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY urgent DESC, due_date ASC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_od_aftercare WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_od_aftercare WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_od_aftercare WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_od_aftercare WHERE deleted = 0 AND urgent = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_od_aftercare (worker_name, dept, factor, judge, disease, actions_text, status, urgent, due_date, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES ( #{workerName}, #{dept}, #{factor}, #{judge}, #{disease}, #{actionsText}, #{status}, #{urgent}0, #{dueDate,jdbcType=DATE}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_od_aftercare SET worker_name = #{workerName}, dept = #{dept}, factor = #{factor}, judge = #{judge}, disease = #{disease}, actions_text = #{actionsText}, status = #{status}, urgent = #{urgent}0, due_date = #{dueDate,jdbcType=DATE}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_od_aftercare SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
